title: stelis dazae
intro: Stelis dazae, also known as the orchid Stelis, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis dazae include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
